oneOf.description: If set to true, the block will have the default explosion resistance. If set to false, this block is indestructible by explosion.

oneOf.title: Destructible by Explosion
oneOf.description: Describes the destructible by explosion properties for this block.

explosion_resistance.description: Sets the explosion resistance for the block. Greater values result in greater resistance to explosions. The scale will be different for different explosion power levels. A negative value or 0 means it will easily explode; larger numbers increase level of resistance.
